jobs.title: Senior Full-stack Python Engineer (m/f/d) - Network Planning
jobs.cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Senior Full-stack Python Engineer (m/f/d) - Network Planning position at Flix. With 2 years of hands-on experience in cloud engineering and DevSecOps, I have worked extensively with Kubernetes, Terraform, Docker, Python, Shell Scripting in production environments.

Your job description emphasizes requirements that align closely with my background — particularly operating production AKS clusters with automated recovery and observability. At Amdocs, I have reduced MTTR by 40% through AKS pod recovery automation, achieved 90% reduction in manual compliance checks via Python tooling, and improved monitoring coverage by 35% using Prometheus and Grafana on Azure.

I am AZ-104 certified and have built open-source tools for Azure security auditing, cost governance, and compliance checking — demonstrating the automation-first mindset this role requires. I would welcome the opportunity to bring this experience to Flix.

Thank you for your consideration. I look forward to discussing how I can contribute to your team.

Best regards,
Pankaja Jagdish Kulkarni
+91 7045149611 | pankajajagdishkulkarni@gmail.com
https://linkedin.com/in/pankaja-jagdish-kulkarni
jobs.tailored_summary: Senior Full-stack Python Engineer (m/f/d) - Network Planning-focused engineer. DevSecOps and Cloud Engineer with 2 years of production experience on Azure and AKS. Skilled in Kubernetes, Terraform, Docker, Python, Shell Scripting, CI/CD. Built automation tools reducing manual ops work by 40-90% and MTTR by 40%. AZ-104 Certified.
